MINI MINUTES: Commissioner Everett Hewlett Jr.; Clerk: NBautista ; Not Reported. (D218)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Tenderloin Housing Clinic, is present. Represented by Jordan San Pedro.
Attorney, Paul Hogarth, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, Gregory Payne, is present.
Attorney, John Lough, representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem David Brillant, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 207, for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
This case settled, the trial date of DEC-13-2010 is vacated.
